parameters.content: ={{ "Job change: " + ($("PD: read lead").item.json.oldCompany || "?") + " → " + $("PD: read lead").item.json.newCompany + ". Found via LinkedIn job-change trigger. Outreach started " + $now.toFormat("dd-MM-yyyy") + ". Lead type: " + $("PD: read lead").item.json.leadType + ". " + ($("PD: read lead").item.json.leadNotes ? ("Note: " + $("PD: read lead").item.json.leadNotes) : "") + " LinkedIn: " + $("PD: read lead").item.json.url }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "ok": true, "dealId": $("PD: create deal").item.json.id, "personId": $("PD: create person").item.json.id, "orgId": $("PD: create organization").item.json.id } }}

assignments.name: systemPrompt
assignments.value: ={{ $json.body.system || "You are a helpful assistant that drafts short, friendly B2B outreach messages in the language of the prompt." }}
